title: The Future Is Domain-Specific Agents - Justin Schroeder, StandardAgents
summary: Justin Schroeder argues that domain-specific agents composed together form a more powerful and reliable AI architecture than skills-based approaches. This composition pattern enables smaller models to perform real work and moves AI from internal tools to customer-facing products.
writeup: In this AI Engineer talk, Justin Schroeder of StandardAgents makes the case that composing domain-specific agents yields a more powerful and reliable architecture than skills-based approaches. The argument draws on the composition-over-inheritance pattern: agents are combined rather than loaded with broad skill sets. The claimed payoffs are concrete: composition lets smaller models do real work, and it pushes AI past internal tooling into customer-facing products.
